title: ProMeat
tagline: IIT Bombay Incubated Startup
overview: ProMeat is an IIT Bombay–incubated startup focused on creating plant-based meat alternatives for the Indian market. The brand approached LogicNodes to redesign their website with a clean, modern, and global look—similar to global brands like Impossible Foods—while ensuring a seamless, easy-to-manage backend for their non-technical team.

No consistent use of brand colours or premium identity
Product updates required contacting a developer each time
Backend was complex and not suitable for non-technical founders
Website structure was not scalable for upcoming product launches
goals: A premium, international-quality website aligned with their brand
A simple backend to upload/edit products, images, and content
A scalable structure to support expansion into multiple product categories
Improved responsiveness, performance, and SEO
A design that increases trust and engagement

Enabled product, pricing, image, and content updates—no developer needed
Built scalable categories for future product expansion

Ensured mobile-first responsiveness

title: Sajeev Krushi
tagline: “Garbage to Green” Initiative
overview: Sajeev Krushi was built on a powerful mission: transforming organic waste into sustainable value through vermiculture. Inspired by Masanobu Fukuoka’s “One-Straw Revolution,” the founder aimed to create a system where biodegradable waste becomes high-quality compost, empowering farmers and restoring soil health.
challenges: Lack of digital presence to express the powerful story of “Garbage to Green”
No scalable platform to manage vermiculture projects and compost production
Farmers did not have easy access to high-quality organic fertilisers
Difficulty in training people on vermiculture and waste management
No structured backend to track production, waste inputs, or operational efficiency
Trust-building and brand positioning challenges in the organic farming ecosystem
goals: A strong brand narrative that communicates sustainability and impact
A clean, nature-inspired website showcasing their mission, products, and services
A simple backend system to manage vermiculture units, compost production, and product listings
Tools to track waste input, worm culture growth, and production analytics
Educational sections to guide farmers and aspiring entrepreneurs
A credible digital identity that builds trust and supports expansion

solution_categories.title: Brand Storytelling & Identity
items: Created the brand narrative “Garbage to Green”
Positioned Sajeev Krushi as a blend of waste-management innovation + organic agriculture
Highlighted founder expertise and mission-driven impact

solution_categories.title: UI/UX & Website Design
items: Designed a clean, green-themed website reflecting nature, growth, and sustainability
Structured information around vermiculture services, compost products, training programs, and environmental impact

solution_categories.title: Operations & Admin System
items: Built an admin panel to manage vermiculture project tracking, compost monitoring, and order flow
Simplified workflow for non-technical team members like farmers and managers

solution_categories.title: Waste-to-Value Project Tools
items: Added tools to track waste input and worm culture growth
Enabled annual production analytics to identify efficient projects

features: Strong brand narrative around sustainable waste conversion
Simplified admin panel for project and product management
Clear storytelling that builds trust and credibility
results: Reduced urban and rural biodegradable waste by converting it into compost
Enabled farmers to generate income and restore soil health
Implemented ~20 commercial vermicompost projects
Scalable digital tools allow monitoring of each unit
Promoted organic farming and circular waste systems

title: Campus Networking App
tagline: A Verified Social Platform for Campus Communities
overview: The Campus Networking App is a mobile-first social platform designed to connect students within verified campus environments. LogicNodes delivered a complete MVP including mobile apps (Android & iOS), backend architecture, matching engine, community modules, chat system, and a web-based admin panel. The platform enables safe, verified networking with features like matching, communities, and real-time communication.
challenges: Building the entire platform from scratch with no existing system

Integrating communities, feeds, and real-time chat into one ecosystem
Implementing safety features like reporting, blocking, and moderation
Creating a powerful admin panel for moderation and analytics

Create community-driven engagement through feeds and groups
Ensure user safety with moderation and reporting tools

title: Yanisa
tagline: A Fully Automated Client Onboarding & Service Management System
overview: Yanisa is a fully automated onboarding and service management system designed for service-based businesses. LogicNodes built the entire platform from scratch, enabling dynamic service selection, automated pricing, legal agreement capture, payment processing, invoice generation, and a powerful admin dashboard. The system integrates seamlessly with WordPress while functioning as a scalable standalone platform.
challenges: Manual onboarding processes scattered across multiple platforms
No dynamic pricing for customizable services

Lack of legal compliance through digital agreement capture
No centralized admin system to manage clients and services
